{"type":"dark fantasy tabletop RPG subclass poster","format":"square illustrated poster with ornate parchment-and-gold framing","main_text":{"headline":"{argument name="headline text" default="CAPER HANDLER"}","subtitle":"{argument name="subtitle text" default="Roguish Archetype for D&D 2024"}","section_title":"{argument name="section title" default="THE LITTLE ACCOMPLICES"}","bottom_tagline":"{argument name="tagline" default="Many little paws. One perfect crime."}"},"scene":{"setting":"moonlit gothic city rooftops at night, blue-black sky, full moon, towers, chimneys, warm lit windows, distant spires, thieves' guild atmosphere","central_subject":"a crouching human rogue thief on a steep tiled roof, dark leather armor, belts, pouches, fingerless gloves, scarf and cloak trailing in the wind, one hand braced on the roof, stealthy confident pose, face obscured or shadowed","mood":"nocturnal, cinematic, mischievous, adventurous, high-detail fantasy illustration"},"animal_accomplices":{"count":6,"items":["black cat perched on the left roof ridge wearing a small collar or charm","large rat in the lower left foreground carrying a gold key in its mouth","black raven on the upper right perched on a wooden beam with a small harness and dangling trinket","small monkey on the right hanging from a rope and lifting a tiny coin purse","small ferret or weasel near the lower right beside a metal bucket, looking upward","tiny mouse or small rodent near the bucket, partially hidden as an extra lookout"]},"layout":{"top_panel":"large illustrated rooftop action scene occupying the upper two thirds, headline at the very top in large distressed cream-gold serif capitals, subtitle centered beneath it, thin gold divider lines and crossed lockpick icon above","lower_panel":"aged parchment information box occupying the bottom third, ornate gold corners, dark maroon nameplate for the section title, decorative divider line, body copy on the left, faint circular watermark emblem on the right","watermark_emblem":"pale sepia circular keyhole symbol surrounded by silhouettes of small accomplice animals: cat, bird, rat, monkey","border":"dark navy outer border with thin gold art nouveau corner filigree and decorative rules"},"body_copy":"Some rogues rely on quick hands.
Some rely on lies or magic.
A Caper Handler relies on small accomplices.

Rats slip through bars. Cats cross ledges. Birds watch from above.
Monkeys lift keys, open latches, and carry stolen goods where no thief could reach.

These creatures are not soldiers. They are not guardians.
They are distractions, witnesses, smugglers, lookouts, and living tools.

A Caper Handler does not command the battlefield.
They command the pockets, windows, shadows,
rooftops, and blind spots around it.","style":{"rendering":"polished digital painting, Dungeons & Dragons sourcebook art, dramatic rim lighting, intricate leather and metal details, painterly realism","typography":"vintage fantasy serif display lettering, cream and gold ink, parchment text block with readable black serif body text","color_palette":"midnight blue, charcoal black, warm window amber, aged parchment beige, antique gold, burgundy accents","quality":"high resolution, sharp readable text, balanced poster composition, no modern objects"}}
